enrollment.form.termsAndConditionsConten:
# Welcome to Titulino Languages
By using our services, you agree to the following Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully.

### **1. Data Ownership & Privacy**
The data you provide during your use of our platform is owned by **Titulino Languages**. We collect this data to better serve our students and improve our offerings.

- **Data Sharing**: We do not share your data with any third parties unless explicitly required by law or necessary for service provision.
- **Privacy**: We are committed to maintaining your privacy and improving our security measures with every iteration. However, as a startup, we acknowledge that there are inherent risks in data protection, and we do not assume responsibility for any data loss that might occur.
- **Profile Picture**: If requested during enrollment, by uploading a profile picture you agree that it becomes Titulino Languages property and may be stored and used for enrollment and program purposes.

admin.tools.stewardship.title: Contact Stewardship
admin.tools.stewardship.description: Resolve duplicate identities carefully. Preview every merge before execution and use rollback only after reviewing the audit record.
admin.tools.stewardship.rollbackDescript: This will request the backend rollback workflow for the selected merge.
admin.tools.stewardship.manualDescriptio: Choose the primary contact that survives, then choose the secondary contact that will be merged into it.
admin.tools.stewardship.previewSafetyDes: A merge changes canonical identity, ownership, history, progress, and shop records. Review the preview and enter a reason before confirming.
admin.tools.stewardship.previewEmpty: Choose two contacts and request a preview.
admin.tools.stewardship.reasonPlaceholde: Reason required for the merge audit trail
admin.tools.stewardship.confirmMergeDesc: The primary contact survives and the secondary contact becomes inactive.
admin.tools.stewardship.msg.selectBothCo: Select both a primary and secondary contact.
admin.tools.stewardship.msg.sameContact: Primary and secondary contacts must be different.
admin.tools.stewardship.msg.rollbackMiss: This merge does not include a rollback id.

admin.tools.messaging.description: Build an audience segment, review the matching contacts, then compose a message for the selected rows.

admin.tools.messaging.filtersDescription: Start broad, then narrow the audience by identity, geography, language, courses, progress, certificates, and purchase state.

admin.tools.messaging.tooltip.language: Filter by language in the proficiency history.

admin.tools.monitoring.title: Monitoring
admin.tools.monitoring.processLogs.descr: Inspect backend process events by source. Use filters, refresh, and expand rows to inspect EventData.
admin.tools.monitoring.processLogs.toolt: Filter by log severity. Click Refresh to request matching rows from the backend.
Filter by CreatedAt date range. Leave empty to use the latest logs.
Search Message and EventData JSON. Click Refresh to run the backend search.
Filter by MethodName, route, or backend method.
Filter by CreatedByUser, usually an email or service identity.
Filter by CreatedByRole for the selected log source.
Number of rows requested from the backend.
Skip rows for backend pagination. Use with the row limit.
Reload the selected log source using the current filters.
